items.description: Former member of AML-CS, the Applied Math and Computer Science Lab at Universidad del Norte, Colombia.
items.name: AML-CS

items.description: Maintainer of 'Monocuco', an open source dictionary for slang words and phrases from the Caribbean Region of Colombia.
items.name: Monocuco

items.description: Maintainer of 'Mi horario UN', an open source web app for students of the Universidad del Norte, manage your schedule and import it into Google Calendar.
items.name: Mi horario UN
